rationale: Current title is Accountant at Infosys with a customer support background and no ML, IR, or ranking experience whatsoever.
Career spans operations management, mechanical engineering, and sales with one stint at fictional Wayne Enterprises; zero ML or retrieval engineering experience.
Civil engineer with marketing and sales roles at fictional companies Initech and Dunder Mifflin; ASR skill is speech/CV-adjacent and there is no IR or ranking experience.

Strong Python data-engineering background at product companies (Flipkart, Dream11, Freshworks) with pgvector and LlamaIndex skills, but career has been entirely data pipelines with no production retrieval or ranking system ownership.
HR Manager at fictional Wayne Enterprises with a marketing/operations background and no technical or ML skills relevant to the role.
Entire career is in accounting and HR/consulting analyst roles at Hooli and Initech with only surface-level GenAI curiosity (LangChain courses) and no engineering or IR production experience.
Mechanical engineer with roles at multiple fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Stark Industries, Pied Piper) in mechanical, civil, sales, and graphic design — no ML or IR experience.
HR Manager with 8.7 years entirely in HR, operations, and business analysis at fictional companies (Wayne Enterprises, Initech, Dunder Mifflin) with no ML or engineering depth.
Entire career at TCS in sales executive and graphic designer roles with no ML, Python, or retrieval engineering experience.

Applied ML engineer at real product companies (Observe.AI, CRED, Flipkart) with XGBoost, PyTorch, and PEFT hands-on experience, but work is concentrated in CV, forecasting, and classification with no retrieval, ranking, or IR system ownership.
